summary: Fabric v2.0.0-rc.7 macro closure across 4 user-interaction chains (cold-start / archive / consume / maintenance), 11 items, ~7-8 days. Closes perception gaps left by rc.5+rc.6 wire/schema/injection work so a fresh user can experience the full knowledge loop end-to-end.
approach: Wave-based progressive delivery: Foundations (independent, low-risk: T9 T2 T11 T7) → Schema+infra (new fields + cross-session digest: T6 T5 T10) → Hook+UX (banner reformat + visibility verification + init→skill sentinel: T4 T8 T1) → Docs (cross-references everything: T3). Each wave is independently shippable; coverage gate scripts/rc7-coverage-gate.mjs validates the 5 critical surfaces (config, plan_context symmetry, sentinel lifecycle, doctor_run emission, --apply-lint safety).

design_decisions.decision: Wave-based delivery (Foundations → Schema+infra → Hook+UX → Docs) with strict dependency arrows only across waves
design_decisions.rationale: Each wave is independently testable; failure in late wave doesn't block earlier wins; matches rc.5/rc.6 release rhythm

design_decisions.decision: Sentinel file `.fabric/.import-requested` as cross-surface signal between CLI init and AI-client Skill
design_decisions.rationale: Crosses terminal/AI-client boundary where events.jsonl alone cannot reliably bridge; presence-as-data is simplest IPC
design_decisions.tradeoff: Adds one more file in .fabric/; can become orphaned if user never opens AI client

design_decisions.decision: Per-builder narrow/broad scan classification (not orchestrator-level mapping)
design_decisions.rationale: Path-known-ness is a property of what each builder produces; localizes the decision
design_decisions.tradeoff: New builders must consciously declare scope

design_decisions.decision: Kill fab_plan_context degenerate mode unconditionally (no opt-in flag)
design_decisions.rationale: Symmetric API + reliable knowledge_consumed signal > micro-optimization for small canonical sets
design_decisions.tradeoff: Two MCP calls instead of one for small repos
alternatives: Emit knowledge_consumed inline in degenerate path

design_decisions.decision: Required new pending-frontmatter field `proposed_reason` (enum) + required `## Why proposed` + `## Session context` sections
design_decisions.rationale: Future-self reviewability + input signal for deferred v2.1 maturity-promotion mechanism (Grill #1)
design_decisions.tradeoff: Breaking change for any external caller of fab_extract_knowledge

design_decisions.decision: Defer maturity progression, hook-injection consumption sidecar, and canonical-semantic-dedup to v2.1
design_decisions.rationale: Each needs months of accumulated usage signal before justification; rc.7 lands the input signals (proposed_reason; T9 closing main consumption silent path; T3 surface boundary doc)
alternatives: Ship maturity in rc.7 (no real signal yet)
Ship semantic dedup (LLM scan cost unjustified)

design_decisions.decision: Coverage gate (scripts/rc7-coverage-gate.mjs) bundled into T9+T10+T11 testing surface, not a separate task
design_decisions.rationale: Mirrors rc.5/rc.6 pattern where gate validates the items it covers; avoids artificial task multiplication
design_decisions.tradeoff: Three tasks share responsibility for gate completeness

data_flow.diagram:
fabric init (CLI) → sentinel(.fabric/.import-requested) ─┐
                                                              ├→ SessionStart hook (knowledge-hint-broad.cjs)
                                                              ├→ Stop hook (fabric-hint.cjs)
                                                              └→ fabric-import Skill (clears sentinel)

Stop hook → session-digest writer → .fabric/.cache/session-digests/<sid>.md ─→ fabric-archive Phase 0.0 → fab_extract_knowledge(source_sessions[]) → pending/ frontmatter

fabric doctor (CLI) → events.jsonl(doctor_run) ─→ Stop hook evaluateMaintenanceSignal → Signal D banner → user runs `fabric doctor --lint`

fabric-config.json ─→ config-loader.cjs ─→ {fabric-hint.cjs thresholds, doctor --apply-lint safety}

stages.component: scan builders (tech-stack, module-structure, build-config, code-style, ci-config)
transformations: Builder declares narrow scope + path list
PreToolUse hook matches edit_path against relevance_paths globs

stages.input: Multiple Stop hook session digests + events.jsonl knowledge_proposed event tail
stages.component: fabric-hint.cjs (digest writer) → fabric-archive Phase 0.0 → fab_extract_knowledge → pending/
transformations: Schema source_sessions[] (back-compat shim for legacy single string)

stages.input: Extract input: idempotency_key + proposed_reason + session_context + evidence
stages.output: Pending file with frontmatter proposed_reason + body ## Why proposed + ## Session context + merged ## Evidence
transformations: Enum lookup for Why proposed line

stages.input: fabric doctor --apply-lint invocation + stdin tty state + --yes flag + env var
stages.output: Mutations applied OR exit 1 (no prompt) OR exit 1 (user N)

stages.component: T3 (docs/surfaces.md + README.md + SKILL.md files + init.ts footer)

dependencies: events.jsonl (T10 produces doctor_run, T5 reads knowledge_proposed, T9's downstream fab_get_knowledge_sections produces knowledge_consumed)
canonical/ directory (scan builders write; PreToolUse hook reads; revision_hash gates)

conventions: Events appended to .fabric/events.jsonl as line-delimited JSON
Hooks emit JSON to stdout + human banner to stderr
Skill cross-references at top of SKILL.md as blockquotes
Schemas in packages/shared/src/schemas/ with Zod + default values
ADRs in docs/decisions/ with status/context/decision/consequences format
